mapper.select: SELECT FAQ_TYPE_CD AS faqTypeCd , FAQ_TYPE_NM AS faqTypeNm FROM FAQ_TYPE ORDER BY FAQ_TYPE_NM

SELECT F.FAQ_NO AS faqNo , F.FAQ_TYPE_CD AS faqTypeCd , FT.FAQ_TYPE_NM AS faqTypeNm , F.FAQ_QUESTION AS faqQuestion , F.FAQ_ANSWER AS faqAnswer , TO_CHAR(F.CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createDt FROM FAQ F JOIN FAQ_TYPE FT ON FT.FAQ_TYPE_CD = F.FAQ_TYPE_CD ORDER BY F.CREATE_DT DESC

SELECT F.FAQ_NO AS faqNo , F.FAQ_TYPE_CD AS faqTypeCd , FT.FAQ_TYPE_NM AS faqTypeNm , F.FAQ_QUESTION AS faqQuestion , F.FAQ_ANSWER AS faqAnswer , TO_CHAR(F.CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createDt FROM FAQ F JOIN FAQ_TYPE FT ON FT.FAQ_TYPE_CD = F.FAQ_TYPE_CD WHERE F.FAQ_NO = #{faqNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FAQ (FAQ_NO, FAQ_TYPE_CD, ADMIN_NO, FAQ_QUESTION, FAQ_ANSWER) VALUES (FAQ_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{faqTypeCd}, #{adminNo}, #{faqQuestion}, #{faqAnswer})
